Introducing vind - an alternative to Kind (Kubernetes in Docker)

vind lets you run a full Kubernetes cluster(single node or multi node) directly as a Docker containers.

What vind gives you:

- LoadBalancer services out of the box 
- Join external nodes (including cloud GPUs)
